name: PubMatic
description: Publicly traded supply-side platform with OpenWrap SDK for in-app header bidding and mobile programmatic monetization.

seo.title: PubMatic — Ad Monetization / Mediation
seo.meta_description: PubMatic: Publicly traded supply-side platform with OpenWrap SDK for in-app header bidding and mobile programmatic monetization.

when_to_use: In-app header bidding for mobile publisher monetization
OpenWrap SDK integration for mobile programmatic yield
CTV and mobile inventory monetization via open marketplace

pros: OpenWrap SDK for in-app header bidding
cons: Enterprise sales for meaningful SSP attention
Smaller on-device support than AppLovin MAX
review.verdict: Serious tier-1 SSP for publishers ready to invest in header bidding infrastructure.
review.best_for: Mid-to-large publishers who want genuine header bidding across mobile, web, CTV.
review.not_for: Small apps that prefer simpler mediation SDKs like MAX or LevelPlay.

pricing.high_water_mark_reason: No explicit peak-lock evidence; default FALSE per rules.
